---
publish:
  mode: player
  exclude_sections:
    - "GM Notes"
  exclude_fields:
    - secrets
  exclude_dirs:
    - _meta
    - _Templates
  four_oh_four:
    style: in-world
    message: "The stars are not yet right for this knowledge..."
  theme:
    genre: "horror"
  overrides:
    exclude: []
    include: []
    fields: {}
---
